INSURANCE BUSINESS (REORGANISATION AND
WINDING UP OF INSURANCE UNDERTAKINGS)

[ L.S.403.15

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 403.15
REGOLAMENTI DWAR INSURANCE BUSINESS
(REORGANISATION AND WINDING UP OF
INSURANCE UNDERTAKINGS)*
1 ta’ Mejju, 2004
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 208 tal-2004, kif emendat bl-Avviżi Legali 403 tal2015 u 317 tal-2024.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

1
